compiled_state.title: Tier E review follow-up: consolidate duplicated helpers via _seam/shared (env_id/author/ghost-check, scratch_cleanup, gitdir parsing)
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Why
The E0-E4 opus review (3-agent panel, 2026-06-14) flagged single-source-of-truth drift introduced during the in-process ports. Non-blocking (correctness verified) but a maintainability liability for agent edits.

## What
- env_id/author/ghost-check are re-implemented inline in transition.py, txn-callers, delete.py, compact.py instead of using rebar._commands._seam (env_id/author/require_not_ghost). The .env-id MISSING fallback even diverges: delete='unknown', compact=_DEFAULT_ENV_ID UUID, transition=_seam empty string. Route all through _seam; document any intentional fallback difference at the seam.
- _scratch_cleanup duplicated in transition.py + delete.py with divergent base-dir derivation; scratch._base_dir is a 3rd copy. Extract one shared scratch_base()/cleanup_for_ticket().
- gitdir-from-.git-file parsing copied in fsck._resolve_tracker_git_dir + 3 local variants inside init.py. Extract one resolve_git_dir() helper (fsck_recover already imports fsck's correctly).
- Stale docstrings/dead code: transition.py top docstring says compact 'still subprocesses' (it was rewired); __init__.py module docstring says 'write path wraps the bash dispatcher' (now in-process); _ok/_json likely dead post-migration; _cli docstring still says 'E0 NOT yet the entrypoint'.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] env_id/author/ghost-check sourced from _seam in transition/txn/delete/compact (or divergence documented)
- [ ] one shared scratch base/cleanup helper; one resolve_git_dir helper
- [ ] stale docstrings refreshed; confirmed-dead _ok/_json removed
- [ ] full suite green; no behavior change (pure refactor)

comments.body:
DONE (commit 49afc8a4). Consolidated the seam duplications: scratch base/cleanup -> scratch.base_dir/cleanup_for_ticket; compact+delete env_id -> _seam.env_id (unified to '' fallback matching transition); deleted dead _ok/_json; present-tense docstrings (transition/delete/compact/scratch/_cli). opus-reviewed clean (behavior-preserving; reducer coalesces ''/None/absent, schema allows '', fork resolves on uuid). Suite 1662 passed; ruff+format green.

DEFERRED item (gitdir helper unification): init._resolve_git_dir / _init_lock_dir have genuinely DIFFERENT semantics from fsck._resolve_tracker_git_dir (diverge on absent-.git and malformed-file cases; init omits the relative-resolve-against-tracker step). Unifying would change init's behavior, so left as-is — documented here rather than forced. Not worth a behavior-risking change for a non-blocking cleanup.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
